summary: The user is developing a project aimed at creating a community for African students at the University of Plymouth, initially named "African Plymouth Student Hub" and later changed to "African to Plymouth." The session involved drafting an introduction, objectives, and goals for the community, as well as discussing steps for implementation and an action plan for each step.
facts: The user is creating a community for African students at the University of Plymouth. The community was initially named "African Plymouth Student Hub" and later changed to "African to Plymouth." The tagline for the community is "Connecting, supporting, and thriving together." The user plans to conduct a needs assessment to identify the challenges faced by African students. The user intends to define the target audience based on survey results and demographic information. The user aims to develop a marketing strategy to promote the community through social media and university channels. The user plans to create engaging content that showcases the benefits of the community. The user will launch the community and encourage participation from students. The user intends to monitor and evaluate the community's growth and engagement regularly.
